---
title: "Task 8"
output: html_document
---

COMPELTED:
+ Get the multi-location short term running COMPLETE!
+ Get the multi-location long term running COMPLETE!

TODO:

+ Investigate other papers
+ uhhh I should probably mention the unstable measure variance to my professor
+ Extend to ARTFIMA
  + ARTFIMA is less good, boooooooo
  + having issues with d and lambda



Possible Expansions 
+ Ahmeds missing observation continuation
+ add observation noise
